UseCaseScenarios.title: AI Persona Research in Action
UseCaseScenarios.description: See how AI Personas built from in-depth interviews transform research across different scenarios. From testing concepts to uncovering insights, our AI Personas provide authentic responses through structured interview processes.

PersonaSimulationSection.title: AI Personas from Deep Interviews
PersonaSimulationSection.description: Advanced AI Personas that simulate authentic human cognition. Whether using our extensive library or creating private personas from your own interview data, these agents maintain consistent personalities and behavioral frameworks to provide realistic insights.
PersonaSimulationSection.technologyQuote: Our deep interview AI Personas are a form of high-precision consumer simulation technology. You can also apply this same powerful technology to your own interview transcripts to create secure, proprietary AI Personas for your exclusive use.
PersonaSimulationSection.technologyDescription: These agents maintain consistent cognitive patterns, emotional responses, and decision-making frameworks that enable authentic research conversations - achieving 85% human-like accuracy in behavioral simulation.
PersonaSimulationSection.learnMoreLink: Learn more about AI Personas from Deep Interviews
PersonaSimulationSection.accuracyDescription: Human-like behavioral consistency in AI persona responses
PersonaSimulationSection.differentiatorDescription: Unlike traditional survey data or statistical models, our AI Personas are sophisticated behavioral simulations that maintain consistent personality traits and decision-making logic in new contexts.

PersonaSimulationSection.ctaTitle: Build Your Custom AI Research Panel
PersonaSimulationSection.ctaDescription: Create private, high-fidelity AI Personas from your own interview data, or leverage our extensive library to discover deep consumer insights.

TestimonialSection.title: Research Teams Love Our Results
TestimonialSection.description: See how professionals use AI persona research to understand consumer behavior and make better decisions faster.
TestimonialSection.timeDescription: Get insights in minutes, not weeks of research.

productManager.quote: We needed to understand how different user segments would react to our new feature. Atypica's AI Personas provided authentic feedback through detailed interviews, giving us insights in hours that would have taken weeks of traditional user research.
productManager.author: Elena Rodriguez
productManager.title: Senior Product Manager

marketingDirector.quote: The AI Personas built from deep interviews were incredibly realistic in their responses. We tested multiple campaign messages through persona interviews and identified the most effective approach before spending on actual ads.
marketingDirector.author: Ben Carter
marketingDirector.title: Marketing Director

founder.quote: As a startup, we couldn't afford traditional focus groups or extensive user interviews. Atypica's AI Persona research gave us deep behavioral insights and validated our assumptions at a fraction of the cost.
founder.author: Sophie Chen
founder.title: Founder & CEO

hero.body: Most AI does tasks. Atypica models why people choose, hesitate, and decide.

twoWorlds.quote: The world in our heads is not a precise replica of reality.
twoWorlds.attribution: — Daniel Kahneman, Thinking, Fast and Slow
twoWorlds.objectiveDesc: The domain of traditional AI — automating tasks, processing data, executing workflows.
twoWorlds.subjectiveDesc: The domain of human decisions — why people choose, hesitate, trust, and act.

twoAgents.title: Simulate × Research
twoAgents.body: One AI becomes the person. Another asks the right questions.

simulator.title: AI Simulator
simulator.description: Becomes a specific person — not a statistical average. Reconstructs how they choose and why they hesitate.

consumer2c.label: 2C Consumer
consumer2c.description: Everyday consumers with real purchase behavior, emotional triggers, and brand preferences.

professional2b.label: 2B Professional
professional2b.description: Business buyers with domain expertise, procurement logic, and ROI-driven decision frameworks.

expert.label: Industry Expert
expert.description: Domain experts with two-layer memory — core knowledge and working knowledge that grows through consultation.

researcher.title: AI Researcher
researcher.description: Asks the right questions, probes deeper, draws out what people struggle to articulate.

mockup.interviewQ1: What factors influence your purchase decisions most?
mockup.interviewA1: Honestly, peer reviews matter more than ads...
mockup.interviewQ2: Can you walk me through a recent example?
mockup.interviewA2: Last month I spent 2 weeks comparing options before...

worldModel.title: Subjective World Model
worldModel.body: Trained on 1M+ real human data samples. Four layers of structure that model who people are — not just what they do.
worldModel.datasetTitle: Four Layers of the Human Subject
worldModel.datasetBody: Each layer captures a different facet of human subjectivity. Together, they produce a model that doesn't just predict — it understands.
worldModel.contradiction: Contradictions between layers are the signal. A person who says they value autonomy but needs external validation to decide is not inconsistent — they are human.

expression.label: Expression
expression.question: What do they say, and how?
expression.description: Language patterns, emotional baseline, declared values — including where declarations contradict actual choices.

story.label: Story
story.question: What narrative explains their choices?
story.description: Motivation logic, causal stories about success and failure, core fears that drive decisions.

cognition.label: Cognition
cognition.question: What decision logic under pressure?
cognition.description: Risk profiles, cognitive biases, value hierarchies — measured, not self-reported.

behavior.label: Behavior
behavior.question: What do they actually do?
behavior.description: Real transactions and economic games. Calibrates the full model — exposing where cognition collapses under real constraints.

worldModel.crossTitle: What People Say vs. What They Actually Do
worldModel.crossBody: The most valuable insight lives in the distance between expression and behavior.

social.does: 62% of purchases follow social exposure within 48h.

worldModel.matrixNote: Expression↔Behavior gap is the largest signal — expressions serve identity performance more than self-disclosure.
worldModel.enableSimulation: Simulation — test products on synthetic consumers.
worldModel.enableCounterfactual: Counterfactual — change one variable, see decisions shift.
worldModel.enableStressTest: Stress Test — adverse scenarios, map value reshuffling.

workflow.title: Use Cases × Workflow
workflow.body: Choose your goal. We assemble the workflow.
workflow.centerDefault: Hover a use case to see its workflow

mockup.briefQuestion: How do Gen-Z consumers perceive clean beauty brands?
mockup.liveMsg1: What does 'clean beauty' mean to you personally?
mockup.liveMsg2: For me it's about transparency — knowing what's actually in the product.
mockup.liveMsg3: When did you first start paying attention to ingredients?

dataAssets.title: Assets of the Subjective World
dataAssets.body: Callable. Verifiable. Built on real behavioral data.

persona.title: AI Persona
persona.subtitle: Virtual Consumer Library
persona.description: Virtual consumers built from real behavioral data. Consistent personality, cognitive biases, and decision frameworks.

sage.title: AI Sage
sage.subtitle: Virtual Expert Library
sage.description: Domain experts with two-layer memory. Core knowledge stays stable, working knowledge grows through every consultation.

panel.title: AI Panel
panel.subtitle: Next-Gen Research Panel
panel.description: Real respondents provide baseline calibration, AI provides scale. No traditional panel company can offer this.

solutions.title: Built for Every Role
solutions.body: From creators to investors — find your workflow.

creators.title: Creators
creators.desc: Discover what will go viral and optimize content strategy.

influencers.title: Influencers
influencers.desc: Turn influence into sustainable income with data-driven insights.

marketers.title: Marketers
marketers.desc: Validate campaigns with real consumer insights before launch.

startupOwners.title: Startup Owners
startupOwners.desc: Kill bad ideas early — validate before spending.

consultants.title: Consultants
consultants.desc: Back recommendations with real consumer research.

researcher.title: Researcher
researcher.desc: Scale qualitative research with AI-augmented interviews.

investor.title: Investor
investor.desc: Predict market outcomes with multi-perspective simulation.

food.quote: We went from months of concept testing to days — and the AI-selected concept outperformed our control by 23%.
food.body: Regular AI consumer feedback collection, validated by real interviews. Co-created chocolate concepts with AI consumers for Lunar New Year, building a concept library filtered by preference, emotional resonance, and market potential.

tools.quote: Professional users are expensive and hard to recruit. Now we have an always-on virtual panel that gives real-time feedback on our CAD prototypes.
tools.body: Built Tier-3 AI Personas from real prosumer interview data. Product teams get instant professional user feedback on concepts, interfaces, and prototypes without recruitment overhead.

university.quote: We simulated policy responses across 20,000 households in days — traditional methods would have taken years.
university.body: Interviewed core family members (couples and parents) via 1-on-1 sessions to create AI Personas, then assembled them into AI Panels. The team tested different policy measures for improving birth rates through virtual panel discussions.

prediction.quote: We call the Subjective World Model via MCP to analyze sentiment on Polymarket events — and place bets based on what the model sees.
prediction.body: An independent developer integrated Atypica's subjective world model through MCP protocol, feeding continuous sentiment signals into prediction algorithms for real-time event forecasting.

closing.title: Ready to Understand Your Users?
closing.body: Let AI model every consumer's subjective world. The harder problem — we've already started.
